commit.message:
refactor: Phase 1 — define TerminalBackend ABCs and implementations

New abstraction layer for cross-platform terminal support:

backend.py:
  - TerminalBackend ABC: create/kill/list sessions, get input/output
  - InputChannel ABC: write bytes, send keys, resize
  - OutputCapture ABC: read snapshots, raw bytes, tail stream
  - SessionInfo/SessionState dataclasses

backends/fifo.py:
  - FifoChannel: consolidated FIFO write logic (was in 4 files)

backends/logfile.py:
  - LogFileCapture: consolidated log reading (was in 3 files)

backends/zellij_backend.py:
  - ZellijBackend: adapter wrapping existing zellij.py into the ABC

Purely additive — no existing code changed. Existing functionality
unaffected. This is the foundation for ConPTY (Windows) and
plugin (zellij WASM) backends.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: 4 gunicorn workers + 30s timeout to prevent hangs

Single worker was getting blocked by trace ingestion,
making the UI unresponsive.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: replace httpx with urllib.request to prevent worker deadlock

httpx async calls inside gunicorn sync workers (via a2wsgi bridge)
cause deadlocks. Use stdlib urllib.request instead.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: use POST for Prometheus proxy to defeat CDN caching

Embr CDN caches GET responses despite no-store headers.
POST requests are never cached by any proxy/CDN.

commit.message:
v0.81 - Fix scroll & iOS gestures, blue triangle enemy

- Fix scrollable panels (Active Boons, Run Loadout, Leaderboards): change
  touch-action on * and body from 'none' to 'manipulation' so pan-y on
  scrollable containers is no longer blocked by ancestor touch-action:none
- Remove JS touchstart 300ms guard that was killing scroll on quick swipes;
  CSS manipulation handles double-tap zoom natively and correctly
- Add -webkit-text-size-adjust/text-size-adjust:none on html to stop iOS
  auto-scaling small text (the root cause of column-zoom on HUD elements)
- Scope touch-action:none explicitly to #cv, #top-hud, #bot-hud, #legend,
  #room-badge, #room-clear, #room-intro — elements with small text that
  don't need any touch interaction, blocking iOS text-column zoom there
- Keep dblclick and contextmenu preventDefault as backup layers
- Triangle enemy: blue color (#60a5fa), blue projectiles, bigger projectiles
  (r:5->8 spawnTB, r:4->7 burst), enemy rendered as equilateral triangle
  pointing toward player, spawn filter limits heavy shooters rooms 20-29

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Phantom-Rebound

commit.message:
Contract show page (#45)

* Add Contract Show page with visual timeline/journey design (Approach 3)

Implements Design Approach 3 for the contract show page:
- Visual timeline/journey style with horizontal progress bar showing contract period
- Timeline milestone indicators for key contract events
- Journey sections: Property, Parties, Terms, Financials, Rent Updates, End
- Color-coded status indicators for past, current, and future contract phases
- Visual indicators for rent periods and indexing updates
- Responsive design (stacked on mobile, two-column on desktop)
- Empty placeholder for future 'Rent Value Over Time' graph

Route: /properties/:property_id/contracts/:contract_id
Placed in :owner live_session scope for authenticated owners

* Refactor timeline components and make compute_rent_value public

- Change compute_rent_value from defp to def in Contracts context
- Add class attribute to timeline_container component for custom styling
- Export compute_rent_value for use in rent period calculations

* Refactor contract show page UI and remove modal

- Replace inline timeline with timeline_container component using slots
- Move notes section to timeline as conditional item
- Remove contract_end_card and integrate status into journey card
- Remove unused helper functions (progress_bar_color, days_remaining, etc.)
- Fix icon centering with flex utilities
- Add scrollable container for rent history
- Change period.amount to period.value for correct data access
- Delete show_modal.ex component in favor of dedicated page

* Update property show to navigate to contract page instead of modal

- Replace modal with navigation to dedicated contract show page
- Add Create Contract button to property header actions
- Remove show_contract_modal state management
- Update tests to verify navigation instead of modal behavior
- Remove modal-related test cases

* Fix sticky positioning of rent graph to clear navbar

* Add generate_rent_chart_data function to Contracts context for generating rent evolution chart data

* Add SteppedLineChart hook and Chart.js line components for rent evolution visualization

* Integrate rent evolution chart into contract show page

* Redesign tenant dashboard contract details section

Update the contract details component to match the visual style of the
active contract section in property_live/show.ex:

- Add section header with status badge and icon
- Restructure contract info into styled grid with icons and labels
- Add indexed rent badge when applicable
- Add days left field next to next rent update
- Replace simple progress bar with enhanced version featuring:
  - Today marker indicator on progress track
  - Color-coded progress (success/warning/error)
  - Start date, month progress, and end date labels
- Improve notes display with better visual separation

Remove legacy helper components:
- contract_timeline, contract_basic_info_grid
- lease_period_item, current_rent_item, payment_due_item
- indexing_info_items and related sub-components

* Reverse income trend order to show most recent months first

* Add view button to contract history timeline and improve mobile responsiveness

- Add view button linking to contract show page on timeline items

- Make tenant info fully visible with text wrapping instead of truncation

- Improve responsive layout: stacked on mobile, side-by-side on desktop

- Reorganize contract period, rent details, and index info for better mobile UX

* Add dynamic back navigation with return_to parameter on contract show page

* Sync active tab state with URL parameters on property show page

* Update property live tests for contract navigation and empty state button

* Add tests for ContractLive.Show page

* Add phx-update="ignore" to chart canvases to prevent LiveView DOM conflicts

* Add shared contract helper functions for progress calculations

* Add shared contract progress bar and next rent update components

* Refactor LiveViews to use shared contract components and helpers

* Simplify contract progress bar to always use primary color

* Remove redundant preload in contract loading

Add :user to get_contract!/2 preloads in Contracts context to centralize
association loading. Remove redundant Repo.preload call from ContractLive.Show.

* Make compute_rent_value private function

Revert compute_rent_value from public (def) to private (defp) since
it's only called internally within the Contracts module.

* Add updated() callback to SteppedLineChart hook

Add updated() callback that destroys and recreates the chart when
LiveView re-renders the element. This ensures chart data updates
are properly reflected.

* Use string comparison for property_id validation in ContractLive.Show

* Implement quarterly data sampling for long contract charts

* Fix line chart initial load animation by using property-based y-axis animation

* Update lib/vivvo_web/live/contract_live/show.ex

commit.message:
v0.79d Comprehensive iOS zoom/magnifier lockdown

- Switch * from touch-action:manipulation to touch-action:none —
  'none' explicitly disables ALL browser touch gestures incl. double-tap
  zoom; 'manipulation' still allowed it on small text per iOS quirks
- Restore touch-action:pan-y on the three scrollable containers
  (#up-active-list, #go-boons-list, #lb-list-shell) so swipe-scroll
  still works inside those panels
- Add dblclick preventDefault on document — iOS can route double-tap
  zoom through dblclick even when touchstart is intercepted

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Phantom-Rebound
repository.description: ghost themed reverse bullet hell

commit.message:
v0.79c Floating joystick anchor drift

- Store rawX/rawY on joy state (updated every touchmove/mousemove)
- tickJoystick(joy, dt) lerps anchor toward thumb when mag exceeds
  1.6x max radius, targeting the position that puts thumb at exactly
  max radius from the new anchor — preserving full directional input
- Drift speed: 5/s (exponential lerp, frame-rate independent)
- Only active during fighting/spawning phases

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
v0.79b Fix iOS double-tap zoom properly

- Move double-tap guard from touchend -> touchstart (touchend fires
  after iOS has already committed to zooming, touchstart stops it)
- Add touch-action:manipulation to * selector so every element opts
  out of double-tap zoom at the CSS level as a second layer of defense

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Phantom-Rebound
repository.description: ghost themed reverse bullet hell

commit.message:
v0.79a Disable iOS double-tap zoom

- Add maximum-scale=1.0 / minimum-scale=1.0 to viewport meta
- Non-passive touchend listener cancels rapid double-taps (<300ms)
  which iOS Safari uses to trigger zoom even with user-scalable=no

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
v0.79 Shield & Rebound

- Shrink joystick radius (40 -> 28) for easier ghost control on mobile
- Armor Weave buffed: 15/30/45% reduction per tier (was 9/18/27%), floor 55%
- Protective Shield already supports 4 shields (MAX_SHIELD_TIER=4)
- Boon reroll system: 1 free reroll per run; earn +1 every 3 damageless
  rooms (capped at 3 stacked); reroll card shown alongside Recover
- iOS Safari magnifier fix: spread user-select/touch-callout onto *
  selector and block contextmenu event to suppress loupe on long-press

- backend/main.py: handler global de excecoes (retorna JSON, nao text/plain)
- backend/routes/projetos.py: try/except em buscar_projeto com log
- backend/integracoes/projeto_clientes.py: nao re-raise excecoes
  nao relacionadas ao esquema (corrige 500 em /projetos/{id})
- dist: rebuild com novo bundle

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial scaffold: Hono + D1 + Drizzle with full API parity

Cloudflare Workers alternative to parable-service (Clojure/DigitalOcean).

- Hono.js framework with TypeScript
- Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) with Drizzle ORM schema for all 15 tables
- Full route parity: health, auth, stories CRUD, puritan library (FTS5),
  assessments, weather proxy, MCP protocol
- Kinde OAuth + JWT + API key authentication middleware
- Server-rendered HTML views with TailwindCSS + Alpine.js + HTMX
- Vitest test setup with @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers
- GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline with Wrangler deploy
- Zod schema validation for all request/response types

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: CORS via proxy Vercel + hydration #418 + rebuild dist

- api.ts: getApiBaseUrlWeb() retorna '/proxy' em producao (nao-local)
  evitando CORS completamente — o browser nao faz cross-origin
- vercel.json: rewrite /proxy/:path* -> Railway (proxy server-side)
- projeto/index.tsx: topInset state inicializado em 0 (igual ao HTML
  estatico), atualizado via useEffect apos hidratacao; corrige React #418
- .gitignore: nega mobile/dist e mobile/lib (padroes Python nao devem
  afetar mobile)
- dist: rebuild completo com novo bundle (entry-e74412fd)

commit.message:
Improve "Activities run as listed" tooltip wording (#42813)

- @noahtalerman: For the following quick win:
  - #41107

The "Activities run as listed" tooltip on the host details upcoming
activity pane said "Currently, only software and scripts are guaranteed
to run in order" — ambiguous wording that implies the order is
configurable or changeable.

- **`frontend/pages/hosts/details/cards/Activity/Activity.tsx`**:
Replace tooltip text with "Software and scripts are always processed in
order. Each waits until the previous one completes." — accurately
reflects the blocking/sequential behavior described in the contributing
guide.

---------
